# Support

| Need | Where |
|------|--------|
| Install / use Rezeptor | [Docs (DE)](https://benjarogit.github.io/rezeptor/) · [Docs (EN)](https://benjarogit.github.io/rezeptor/en/) |
| Write a recipe | [RECIPE-AUTHORING (EN)](https://benjarogit.github.io/rezeptor/en/RECIPE-AUTHORING/) · [DE](https://benjarogit.github.io/rezeptor/de/RECIPE-AUTHORING/) |
| Bug / feature | [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/benjarogit/rezeptor/issues/new/choose) |
| Security | [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) — private advisory, not public issues |

Do not open issues on archived repos (`photoshopCClinux`, `wiso-steuer-portable-linux`, `crkcachy`) — use **this** repository only.
